topic: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have been living here for two years. I have been living here since 2020. She has been studying for three hours. She has been studying since morning. We have been friends for five years.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We have been friends since college. He has not done this work for a week. He has not done this work since Monday. I have known this for ten years. I have known this since 2015.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वह दो महीने से बीमार है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He has been sick for two months.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "She have been studying since morning."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She has been studying since morning.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They have been in this house for three years. They have been in this house since their marriage. I have been waiting for an hour. I have been waiting since noon.
